title: Possible Spinoffs After 3010
wikitext:
[]: Possible Spinoffs After 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by boyfrand » Wed Jan 06, 2021 9:27 am Hi Everyone! I know Anno said at some point he wants Eva to be like Gundam. Does anyone have a convenient link for that? But anyway, do you think some Eva spinoffs or other media will be announced some point after 3.0+1.0? I hope they plan a movie about Second Impact (maybe it will even show how that body outline ended up in 1.0). If Misato’s scar similar to Lilith’s scar isn’t in the final movie, I hope it gets explained somehow. A miniseries explaining the events during the timeskip would also be awesome. But other than that, I’m not sure what I would like to see in additional Rebuild material. I don’t know if Anno meant his Gundam idea would include NGE. But it would be nice to get something animated about the Classified Information (or whatever it’s called) from that Eva video game, that explains more lore. If there’s another series just redoing the plot of NGE (or changing it up a bit like NTE), I don’t think I would be interested after the Rebuild experience. I don’t really want to start again, when there are potential, interesting side stories.

[]: Re: Possible Spinoffs After 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Kendrix » Wed Jan 06, 2021 10:30 am I don't think that would work. You could do it with Gundam cause the core of that was robot fights & war politics, you could do it, say, with any large enough 'verse, but the essence & appeal of EVA seems too tightly tied to this particular set of characters and that particular timeframe. Though i don't doubt that we'll have no shortage of video games, spinoff mangas or stuff like puchi Eva I also don't think that these hypothetical spinoffs would be strictly rebuild verse but rather use a vaguely similar concept, like the various incarnations of digimon

[]: Re: Possible Spinoffs After 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Wed Jan 06, 2021 12:04 pm Here's another topic about it: https://forum.evageeks.org/thread/18751/Anno-Khara-Expo-Interview-Eva-Going-Gundam-Films-TV-etc-From-Different-Directors-Possible/

[]: Re: Possible Spinoffs After 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by AdamMalkovitch » Thu Jan 07, 2021 2:52 pm I'd really love to see Anim a get an anim e adaptation. It's a common thing for novels to get anime made of them in Japan, especially those based on a pre-established IP like EVA. Besides, all that action is too awesome to keep restrained to text and a few illustrations. I just hope the first half of the first episode is dedicated to establishing exactly what happened in the timeline where Unit 02 was chosen as Seele's medium instead of Unit 01, why they did so, how Kaji is still alive, and an awesome Evangelion 64/Jo style fight sequence of Shinji in Unit 01 fighting the MP EVAs and saving Asuka in Unit 02.

[]: Re: Possible Spinoffs After 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Zusuchan » Thu Jan 07, 2021 3:32 pm An Anima adaptation could be interesting, but there would have to be a lot of work by necessity going into making sure the plot is actually logical and understandable in some way, instead of the no-holds-barred all-doors-opened absolute insanity that is the plot of Anima with all the fairly incredible stupidity and stupendous amount of logic leaps.

[]: Re: Possible Spinoffs After 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by AdamMalkovitch » Thu Jan 07, 2021 4:10 pm I've only read the official US volume 1 so far, I'm intrigued that it gets even more insane than Longinus the Space Hedgehog and the Shrinking Planet

[]: Re: Possible Spinoffs After 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Blockio » Thu Jan 07, 2021 4:22 pm Unfortunately, it does x.x the closest we have to an animated Anima (lol) right now would probably be Iconic Field , very fun short from Animator Expo

[]: Re: Possible Spinoffs After 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Kiiwiibird » Fri Jan 08, 2021 4:02 am honestly i'll never stop holding out for some kind of live action/realistic cgi movie i don't care how unrealistic it is, you'll pry that concept from my cold, dead hands

[]: Re: Possible Spinoffs After 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Blockio » Fri Jan 08, 2021 11:43 am Also from Animator Expo, Another Impact and the OPPO ACE Promotional video are probably the closest we'll get to that for the time

[]: Re: Possible Spinoffs After 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Jäeger » Sun Jan 10, 2021 6:55 pm Thumbs Up for a REAL adaptation of Puchi Eva, not the surreal nightmarish speechless slapstick we got, which was inspired but not based upon the manga. And Anima, of course.

[]: Re: Possible Spinoffs After 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Mon Jan 11, 2021 9:29 pm Zusuchan wrote: An Anima adaptation could be interesting, but there would have to be a lot of work by necessity going into making sure the plot is actually logical and understandable in some way

[]: Re: Possible Spinoffs After 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Jäeger » Tue Jan 12, 2021 6:01 am BernardoCairo wrote: Zusuchan#905656 wrote: An Anima adaptation could be interesting, but there would have to be a lot of work by necessity going into making sure the plot is actually logical and understandable in some way

[]: Re: Possible Spinoffs After 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Tue Jan 12, 2021 4:59 pm I don't know if light novels are hard to adapt to anime, but it happens quite a lot, more often than manga nowadays. It's quite profitable and Anima is already finished.

[]: Re: Possible Spinoffs After 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Jäeger » Wed Jan 13, 2021 4:58 pm I agree with your arguments but remember : Eva is a money making machine and is not gonna stop after NTE. Add the popularity of the light novel market..... Anima is a good, if not the BEST, candidate to an anime adaptation. I'm only worried about which studio would be at charge. And Yeah, GOS 2ND was a a coward move, like they seré afraid to embrace de full romcom tríp. First Of all...where is my genki Rei? Puchi Eva got her at least. The manga, not the WTF ONA.

[]: Re: Possible Spinoffs After 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Wed Jan 13, 2021 11:57 pm On Anima: Yep, you are right! It would be cool to live in a world where everything is created with no financial incentive behind it, but that is not the reality hahaha! Well, if an adaptation is really created, I hope it comes out as good as possible. I also hope that people don't get confused by it. I mean, there are already many guys who are clueless about the true nature of the Rebuids. I've seen people saying that they were created to explain the ending of Evangelion which, supposedly , is very confusing hahahahahaha! Can you imagine the mess these guys would make if Anima was animated (considering how crazy this story is)? Probably, many would think this is a canonical continuation of the original series, or something like that hahaha. On Angelic Days/Iron Maiden: I believe that the implementation of the Evangelions was more natural in the game. Now, in the manga it was bizarre! I think the story would have been a lot more interesting if they weren't there. I felt that they served only as a mere fanservice, but ok.

[]: Re: Possible Spinoffs After 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Jäeger » Thu Jan 14, 2021 2:19 am BernardoCairo wrote: On Anima: Yep, you are right! It would be cool to live in a world where everything is created with no financial incentive behind it, but that is not the reality hahaha! Well, if an adaptation is really created, I hope it comes out as good as possible. I also hope that people don't get confused by it. I mean, there are already many guys who are clueless about the true nature of the Rebuids. On Angelic Days/Iron Maiden: I believe that the implementation of the Evangelions was more natural in the game. Now, in the manga it was bizarre! I think the story would have been a lot more interesting if they weren't there. I felt that they served only as a mere fanservice, but ok.

[]: Re: Possible Spinoffs After 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Fri Jan 15, 2021 10:56 am Jäeger wrote: I agree with your arguments but remember : Eva is a money making machine and is not gonna stop after NTE. Add the popularity of the light novel market..... Anima is a good, if not the BEST, candidate to an anime adaptation. I'm only worried about which studio would be at charge.

[]: Re: Possible Spinoffs After 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Fri Jan 15, 2021 2:09 pm ElMariachi wrote: But if they do that, there are things that will need to be changed, like the whole Mari loli catgirl, that thing needs to die in a fire.

[]: Re: Possible Spinoffs After 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Jäeger » Sat Jan 16, 2021 4:31 am BernardoCairo wrote: ElMariachi#906907 wrote: If they adapt it, I would like them to do a complete overhaul in some of Anima's core elements. Not only to better suite its new anime nature, but also to fix some of this "weird" stuff.

[]: Re: Possible Spinoffs After 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Zusuchan » Sat Jan 16, 2021 4:35 am Jäeger , stop quoting entire posts when it is not necessary. Only reply to the parts of the post relevant to what you are going to say. Also, it might be a good idea to take further Anima-related discussion into the thread committed to it .
